info.name: Expensify Financial Auditor API - Complete
info.description: Complete API collection for testing the Advanced Financial Auditor with unified workflow

request.description:
SINGLE ENDPOINT - Complete workflow:
1. Upload CSV file
2. Prepare & clean data
3. Extract features & violations
4. Run audit analysis
5. Generate comprehensive report

Returns: {status, message, report: {processing, audit_analysis, executive_summary}}
Upload CSV for data preparation and cleaning
Analyze expense data and return comprehensive audit report with risk assessment, violations, fraud signals, and recommendations
High-risk scenario: Multiple high-value expenses from same employee with repeated violations
Low-risk scenario: Clean expenses with no violations, no fraud signals
